JOIN OUR TEAM

Build Something That
Actually Matters

We hire engineers and environmental professionals who want to work on real ZLD, RO reject, and evaporation projects — based in Ahmedabad, growing since 1998.

Technical Work That Counts

You'll work on patented systems deployed across 100+ industrial sites in India. Real engineering problems. Real environmental impact.

26+ Years of Expertise

Join a team with deep institutional knowledge in ZLD, RO reject treatment, and non-thermal evaporation technology that is patented and proven.

Based in Ahmedabad

Our offices and works are in Ahmedabad, Gujarat — one of India's fastest growing industrial hubs. On-site and field roles available.

OPEN ROLES

What We're
Looking For

We hire across engineering, operations, sales, and technical support. If you have a background in any of the following, we want to hear from you:

  • Environmental / Chemical Engineers
  • Mechanical / Industrial Engineers
  • ETP / STP / ZLD Plant Operators
  • Sales & Business Development (Industrial Sector)
  • IoT / Instrumentation Technicians
  • Project Management & Site Supervision
APPLY ONLINE

Job application

Fields marked * are required. Upload your CV as PDF or Word (max 10 MB recommended).
